realMoney.title: Real Money Spend Calculator
realMoney.description: Here you can calculate how much real money and Tibia Coins you would spend to get certain quantity of Tibia Gold

calculator.priceFor250TcMsg: Price for 250 Tibia Coins must be at least 2 characters.
calculator.tibiaGoldForOneTcMsg: Tibia gold for one Tibia Coin must be at least 2 characters.
calculator.goldToConvertMsg: Gold to convert must be at least 2 characters.
calculator.priceFor250TcDesc: The price in real money, default is $200 pesos MXN.
calculator.tibiaGoldForOneTc: Tibia Gold for ONE Tibia Coin
calculator.tibiaGoldForOneTcDesc: The amount of Tibia Gold for ONE Tibia Coin, default is 40k gold.
calculator.goldToConvertDesc: Enter the amount of gold you want to convert, with format "10kk", for example.

imbuings.title: What imbuements can I set to my item?
imbuings.description: Select your item from list and learn which imbuements it can have.

huntingSpots.title: Where can I hunt at certain level? What set should I use?
huntingSpots.description: Here you can find hunting spots as well as recommendations of set to use there and which imbuements to use.

exaltationForge.title: Exaltation Forge Simulator
exaltationForge.description: Estimate fusion gold, Exalted Core usage, and item cost up to a target tier. Forge gold per classification matches Tibia Wiki (regular fusion).

coinsToMoney.title: Tibia Coins to Real Money Calculator
coinsToMoney.description: Here you can calculate how much real money would cost certain amount of Tibia Coins.

calculator.priceForOneTcDesc: The price in real money, default is $0.84 pesos MXN.
calculator.tcQuantityDesc: The amount of Tibia Coins you want to convert, default is 250.
